data.title: Exhibitus launches EXstudios, led by Richard Sears, to expand experiential work. ATLANTA, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Renowned creative professional Richard Sears has been appointed to lead Exhibitus' newly established division, EXstudios, in Atlanta. This dedicated experiential strategy and creative ideation studio marks a significant expansion of the company's work in this field. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026. This move reflects the industry's increasing focus on immersive experiences and innovation.

data.title: Crypto investment firm Pantera Capital forecasts major consolidation in corporate crypto holdings in 2026, as few big players will dominate. Smaller companies expected to be acquired.
data.description: Pantera Capital anticipates a period of notable consolidation in corporate crypto treasuries in the upcoming year. The forecast suggests that a select number of major entities will control the demand for digital assets, while smaller firms are likely to be acquired.

data.title: PSQ Impact selected by Donald J. Trump Presidential Library for digital fundraising platform, NYSE: PSQH, to achieve goals.
data.description: PSQ Holdings, Inc. publicized that their advanced fundraising platform, PSQ Impact, was chosen by the Donald J. Trump Presidential Library for digital fundraising support. This collaboration with the Trump Presidential Library, announced today, is aimed at broadening the library's donor network and reaching ambitious fundraising targets. PSQ Holdings, Inc. is listed on NYSE as PSQH. The platform will assist the library in enhancing its online fundraising capabilities for its operations.

data.title: Northpointe Bank partners with Tavant to use TOUCHLESS® AI Mortgage Platform for faster transactions and enhanced borrower experience.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, a prominent AI-powered fintech solutions and digital engineering provider, Tavant, revealed that Northpointe Bank, a distinguished financial institution known for inventive lending solutions, has opted for Tavant’s TOUCHLESS® AI Mortgage Transformation Platform. This move aims to facilitate the digital overhaul of its processes and enhance efficiency. Through this platform, Northpointe Bank anticipates expediting transactions, simplifying borrower experiences, and optimizing the loan origination journey.

data.title: PlayVS acquired Vanta Esports to enhance the nation's largest education-focused gaming ecosystem, offering students nationwide access to coaching and competition. Los Angeles, Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: Today, on January 22, 2026, PlayVS, the primary scholastic and collegiate gaming and esports platform in North America, revealed a collaboration with another reputable esports community. This alliance aims to enhance the availability of coaching, competitive opportunities, and educational resources for students across the country. The partnership between these two communities is set to create a significant impact on the scholastic esports scene, influencing a large number of students involved in the gaming and esports realm.

data.title: Billionaire Ken Griffin warns about government spending risks, cites US debt of $38 trillion. Public sector spending seen as main threat to financial stability. ECB President Lagarde echoes concerns.
data.description: During the World Economic Forum, Citadel founder Ken Griffin raised concerns about sovereign debt as a major threat to financial stability in 2026, dismissing private market speculation. Speaking alongside BlackRock Inc. CEO Larry Fink and ECB President Christine Lagarde, Griffin attributed the risk to unchecked public sector spending, particularly highlighting the $38 trillion U.S. debt. He emphasized how governments worldwide are surpassing their means through excessive spending. Contrary to historical comparisons to the Great Depression triggered by private sector excess, Griffin warned that the current era is marked by government overspending. Lagarde also cautioned against relying on central banks for fiscal needs, emphasizing the dangers of "fiscal dependency."

data.title: Hoth Therapeutics achieves 100% clinical response and 50% reduction in disease severity in EGFR-treated cancer patients.
data.description: By Week 6, the primary endpoint ARIGA showed an impressive approximately 50% enhancement from the baseline, leading all evaluated patients to achieve low-severity disease levels. Furthermore, secondary endpoints indicated around a 34% amelioration in oncology toxicity according to the CTCAE classification and a notable 37% decrease in patient-reported pruritus. This promising data was revealed in New York on January 22, 2026.

data.title: Bandwidth's report shows significant messaging transformation with RCS, AI, and trust leading the shift from SMS to rich customer conversations by 2026.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on January 22, 2026, a significant transformation is occurring in business messaging. The shift from traditional 2-way SMS to more intricate customer interactions is primarily propelled by Rich Communication Services (RCS) and AI technology. This change is considered the most substantial in the industry in the past ten years, signifying a shift towards more engaging and dynamic conversations between businesses and consumers. The numbers back this trend, showcasing a notable increase in the adoption of RCS and AI technologies for customer engagement.

data.title: McDermott wins EPCI contract from ADNOC for Nasr-115 Expansion Project, 130km northwest of Abu Dhabi.
data.description: In a recent announcement on January 22, 2026, McDermott successfully secured a significant contract from ADNOC. This contract pertains to the Nasr-115 Expansion Project, positioned around 130 kilometers (81 miles) northwest of Abu Dhabi. McDermott will be responsible for providing engineering, procurement, construction, and installation (EPCI) services for this project. The partnership between McDermott and ADNOC highlights a significant development in the oil and gas sector, emphasizing the importance of efficient and high-quality service delivery in the industry.

data.title: Audax Strategic Capital invests in Strickland Brothers, a national operator of 10-minute oil change service centers backed by Princeton Equity Group.
data.description: In a recent announcement, Audax Strategic Capital (ASC) shared that they have made a structured equity investment in Strickland Brothers, a company known for operating and franchising national drive-thru, 10-minute oil change, and automotive maintenance service centers. Strickland has garnered recognition as a prominent player in this sector. The investment came as Audax showed confidence in Strickland's potential and growth trajectory. Furthermore, Strickland Brothers is managed by Princeton Equity Group (Princeton), a private equity firm located in Princeton. This move underlines ASC's commitment to providing tailored mid-hold equity solutions.
